title: Mildly Sweet Thai Chicken Noodles
description: A tangy and snappy Thai dish featuring chicken, noodles, and a hint of sweetness, perfect for a brunch mood, made with diabetic-friendly ingredients and a crunchy twist from rice krispies and candy

ingredients.name: candy pieces
ingredients.notes: such as m&m's or chopped peanut butter cups

instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside
In a large skillet, heat the peanut oil over medium-high heat and cook the chicken until browned and cooked through
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and honey until well combined
Add the soy sauce mixture to the skillet with the chicken and stir to coat
Add the crushed rice krispies and candy pieces to the skillet and stir to combine
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the chicken and rice krispie mixture
Season with salt and black pepper to taste
Transfer the noodle mixture to a serving platter and garnish with chopped scallions
